title: Pre-ticket audit: live staged generate-run-report on staged spine (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses deterministic generate-run-report after reconcile. Pre-ticket audit should confirm whether any live LLM report path is valid before broader milestones.
acceptance_criteria: Audit documents NO-GO or narrow scope for live LLM report on staged spine.
Distinguishes deterministic generate-run-report from draft_run_summary LLM task (Phase 0 stub).
